context: Tests whether the agent implements a UIKit settings screen following modern iOS best practices: trait-change handling with registerForTraitChanges, Dynamic Type support, semantic dark-mode colors, VoiceOver accessibility, modern cell configuration APIs, compositional list layout, keyboard avoidance via UIKeyboardLayoutGuide, availability gating, and correct lifecycle method choice.

checklist.name: registerForTraitChanges used
checklist.description: Uses registerForTraitChanges(_:handler:) to respond to trait changes — does NOT override traitCollectionDidChange(_:)

checklist.name: CGColor re-resolved on trait change
checklist.description: Any CALayer color property (borderColor, shadowColor, etc.) is re-assigned inside a registerForTraitChanges handler or equivalent callback — NOT set once at setup time

checklist.name: Semantic colors used
checklist.description: Cell and view backgrounds/foregrounds use semantic UIColor values such as .label, .systemBackground, .secondarySystemGroupedBackground, or similar — NOT hardcoded UIColor(red:green:blue:) values

checklist.name: Dynamic Type fonts
checklist.description: Text labels use UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle:) rather than UIFont(name:size:) or UIFont.systemFont(ofSize:)

checklist.name: adjustsFontForContentSizeCategory set
checklist.description: All labels (or cells) that display text have adjustsFontForContentSizeCategory = true

checklist.name: UICollectionViewCompositionalLayout used
checklist.description: The collection view layout is created with UICollectionViewCompositionalLayout (e.g. .list(using:) or a custom compositional layout) — NOT UICollectionViewFlowLayout

checklist.name: UIListContentConfiguration used
checklist.description: Cell content is configured via cell.defaultContentConfiguration() / UIListContentConfiguration — does NOT access cell.textLabel, cell.detailTextLabel, or cell.imageView

checklist.name: configurationUpdateHandler used
checklist.description: At least one cell uses cell.configurationUpdateHandler to apply state-dependent styling (e.g. text color change on selection or highlight)

checklist.name: VoiceOver properties set
checklist.description: At least one custom or non-standard element has isAccessibilityElement = true and sets both accessibilityLabel and accessibilityTraits

checklist.name: UIAccessibilityCustomAction used
checklist.description: The row with a swipe action also sets accessibilityCustomActions with at least one UIAccessibilityCustomAction exposing an equivalent action for VoiceOver users

checklist.name: UIKeyboardLayoutGuide used
checklist.description: The text input at the bottom is constrained to view.keyboardLayoutGuide.topAnchor — does NOT use UIResponder keyboard notifications (NSNotification.Name.UIKeyboardWillShow etc.)

checklist.name: viewIsAppearing used
checklist.description: Initial geometry-dependent or trait-based layout work is done in viewIsAppearing — NOT in viewWillAppear

checklist.name: #available guards iOS 26+ APIs
checklist.description: Any iOS 26-specific API (e.g. .flushUpdates animation option, updateProperties, Liquid Glass) is wrapped in if #available(iOS 26, *) with a fallback — OR no iOS 26 APIs are used at all
